title: SchematicPreview
description: 3D schematic previews & other utilities for litematica
body:
# SchematicPreview

Litematica fabric addon that adds multiple useful features.

## Mod features:

### Schematic previews
![previews](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DimasKama/SchematicPreview/refs/heads/master/images/previews.png)

### Directories' icons
![directories_icons](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DimasKama/SchematicPreview/refs/heads/master/images/directories_icons.png)

### Replace button in material list
![replace_button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DimasKama/SchematicPreview/refs/heads/master/images/replace_button.png)
